content:
Hello there Stacylanders.



I don’t know what computer you use, but you can use the Proton Mail Bridge app. Insert your account, and choose or get a username and password—not the normal credentials from your regular account—and go to that email client, Thunderbird, and provide them with these bridge credentials, such as the password and username

Greetings googlethunderbird.
creator: Googlethunderbird.

content:
Thunderbird is designed like that (in html format): we you are editing the work "here", you will not see the link behind. After you send the email, the link will be activated. If you want to see/edit the link while editing your email, using right click.

If you choose plain text format, you will see the links.
creator: wxie2016

content: This is bug https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2027673 Switch to the Calendar tab, go to View > Calendar > Current View and uncheck "Rotate View"
